title: Token Credential
description: Base token credential schema. Concrete payment handlers may extend this schema with additional fields and define their own constraints.

type.description: The specific type of token produced by the handler (e.g., 'stripe_token').

constraint.title: Token Credential Constraint
constraint.description: Typed constraint entry indicating support for token credentials. `constraints.funding_sources` can describe requirements on the underlying funding source represented by the token.

oneOf.title: Extension Funding Source Constraint
oneOf.description: Extension point for handler-specific funding source constraint entries. UCP-defined funding source types are excluded here so their concrete constraint schemas remain machine-validated.

funding_sources.description: Constraints on the underlying funding source behind the token credential. Use this only when token acceptance depends on what the token represents.
